pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify this path.
Task description explicitly instructs to set width to 1920.
Task description explicitly instructs to set height to 1080.
Task description explicitly instructs to set fieldOfView to 1.57.
Task description explicitly instructs to set focalLength to 0.05.
Task description explicitly instructs to set minFocalDistance to 0.1.
Task description explicitly instructs to set maxFocalDistance to 10.0.
Task description explicitly instructs to set maxFieldOfView to 1.57.
Task description explicitly instructs to set minFieldOfView to 0.157.
setup_task.sh generates the world file with DEF INSPECTION_CAMERA Camera { name "inspection_camera" }.
setup_task.sh generates the world file with DEF CRAWLER_ROBOT Robot.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for webots_env configure_ptz_camera_optics task by confirming that the task operates on a synthetically generated Webots world. Verified that the expected target camera modifications (1920x1080 resolution, 1.57 base FOV, 0.05 focal length, 0.1 min focal dist, 10.0 max focal dist, 1.57 max FOV, and 0.157 min FOV) and the target node names explicitly match the setup script generation and task description instructions.
